'''Aeran''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] weapons expert who lived on [[Junction V]] and was a close friend to [[Cilia Dil]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], she joined a select group, along with her friend Cilia, Stephin, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], flew to [[Delaluna]] to steal plans on the super-weapon, [[Annihilator (Executor-class)/Legends|''Annihilator'']]. However, these weapons did not exist and it was just a rumor that [[Lorian Nod]] was using on [[Junction V]]. Aeran took this step in part of the mission, but not because she was exposed to no arrest warrant, but instead returned to the resistance movement.

{{Char-stub}}
